executiveSummary.text: AIB Group plc (AIB) is now back in sync with the canonical DYOR HQ sheet after the metadata repair pass. The current stance is REDUCE with conviction 50/100, using USD 22.29 as the latest stored price reference where available.

businessModel.text: AIB Group plc is a diversified distribution and support-services business where capital allocation, margin discipline and resilient customer relationships matter more than headline growth alone.

recentCatalysts.text: Acquisition execution, energy and healthcare demand, working-capital control and cash returns remain the main drivers.

thesisEvaluation.text: Base case: the core operating backdrop remains good enough to support the present reduce stance, but not strong enough to justify a looser risk view without better evidence. Bull case: execution and demand improve faster than expected. Bear case: operating or funding pressure worsens and compresses valuation further.

keyRisks.text: Distribution margins can be thin and cyclical. Acquisition integration can disappoint. Supplier concentration can raise bargaining risk. Energy and industrial end-markets can soften. FX can move reported earnings around.

risks.risk: Distribution margins can be thin and cyclical.
Supplier concentration can raise bargaining risk.
Energy and industrial end-markets can soften.
FX can move reported earnings around.

whoShouldOwn.text: Own: Quality-focused investors who like cash-generative distribution models. Avoid: Investors seeking clean secular growth without cycle exposure.

recommendation.text: REDUCE - Conviction: 50/100. This rebuilt page is intentionally concise, but it is now internally coherent and aligned to the corrected ticker and company metadata.

entryExit.text: Keep position sizing consistent with a reduce stance until fuller company-specific analysis is refreshed.

sources.marketData: Live quote data sourced via the DYOR HQ proprietary market data workflow and internal canonical mapping.
